zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Mabel Croftes於1420年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾時，她的父親John Croftes25歲，母親Isabel21歲。她於大約1441年與George Neville在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾拉內拉爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Croftes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Mabel Croftes was born in 1420, in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Croftes, was 25 and her mother, Isabel, was 21. She married George Neville about 1441, in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Mabel Croftes est née en 1420, à Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Croftes, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé George Neville environ 1441, à Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Mabel Croftes 1420 in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Croftes 25 und ihre Mutter Isabel 21. Sie hat um 1441 in Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom George Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mabel Croftes è nata il nel 1420 nel Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Croftes, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabel, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato George Neville circa 1441, nel Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Mabel Croftes(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라그널에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Croftes(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1441년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 라그널에서 George Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mabel Croftes nasceu em 1420, em Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Croftes, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com George Neville aproximadamente 1441, em Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Mabel Croftes родилась в 1420 г. в местности рагналл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Croftes было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Neville около 1441 г. в местности рагналл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Mabel Croftes nació en 1420, en Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Croftes, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 21 años. Se casó con George Neville aproximadamente 1441, en Ragnall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas.
